name: worktree-switch
description: Switch branches as worktree windows: branch = worktree = window.

worktreeSwitch.setupWorktreeCommand.markdownDescription: Shell command run inside a freshly created worktree (e.g. `yarn install` or `bash dev/setup.sh`). Chain steps with `&&`. Runs in the platform's default shell with the worktree as the working directory, and with `WORKTREE_MAIN`, `WORKTREE_PATH`, and `WORKTREE_BRANCH` set in the environment. Leave empty to skip setup. Set this in workspace settings (`.vscode/settings.json`) so it's shared with the repo.
